CONTACT: Jason W. Travis, Contract Specialist, Phone 499641835108, Email jason.w.travis.civ@mail.mil
DIV: The Government intends to solicit a service requirement for the training and supervision of foreign national, mine detection dog handlers in Iraq. Training will consist multiple weeks of classroom education and field exercises.  Supervision will consist of multiple months of overseeing real/live mine detection in and around Iraq. the Government will be seeking instructor(s) knowledgable on International Mine Action Standards, who can accomplish the following objectives: observe and promote long-term humane care for the dogs, train and instruct handlers and supervisors, certify new instructors, and instruct safe, efficient, and effective tactics, techniques and procedures for mine detection. A complete Performance Work Statement will be included with the soliciation.
SUBJECT: Refuse Collection
